summary: campaign-C plan READY (8/10, almost) on round 1. 13 self-contained tasks, parseable, dependencies acyclic. 6 plan-text weaknesses all fixed inline: Task4/Task6 completion rules (no circular dep on Task7), Task7 split into priority-ordered subdeliverables + named leakage_utility.json contract for Task12, Task1 acceptance made file-checkable, Task8 per-claim proof-check artifact, Task13 B2-mandatory/B1-optional.
